raw_text: The experience from blinkit is very good but sometimes The delivery partner don't come on my door step or near my location . ( Mughalsarai ) I request blinkit to fix this problem. I have also insert my live location but they didn't check until I say them to check my location.

i am rating blinkit only 1 star becuz every time i order something i bought it like 1000 to 2000 items all together and when delivery partner delivers the items are not all together they have been like broken or sometime missing one day i had a loss of 500 rupee the blinkit is currupt only use blinkit to order few things.

Sent me a product with damaged packaging. I asked for replacement. They arranged for exchange but the return has to be done first. I said okay and returned the damaged item. After about 20 minutes the delivery guy cames in with the same damaged item as the replacement. Bloody buggers. Aren't even ashamed of the poor service.

A very bad experience due to completely damaged fruits received, when I asked to return the product at the same time with the delivery boy, not ready to return. The main issue is that the delivery boy handed over the product after payment. Customer is trapped between the store and the delivery boy. your app helpline is also not supportive as of the real issue. need to improve customer service, who can understand the reason and exact issue for the right solution.

helpful for the last minute but some things piss me offfff!! there's no share tracking details button, even after mentioning someone else's number they call on the registered number, their map doesn't show the real time updates, their help desk chatbot is veryy limited with its approach😤

Blinking is one of the best app I have ever seen but in some emergencies if we want to to order a print or item and it almost cost less than 100-200₹ ,they take a lot of DELIVERY CHARGE,I have a request with blinking to reduce Blinkit Charges as soon as possible....

i am very disappointed because i order a notebook , when it come i see that there is name of another parson is there and a adult drawings are also made . I also put complant then the app customer service say they will return it but nothing happenes . I DONT SAY THAT IT IS A BAD APP BUT SOME TIME IT GIVE HUGE PROBLEM AND NO ONE SOLVE IT

Very disappointing experience. I added ₹149 to Blinkit Money but I’m unable to place any order. All payment methods are disabled or showing errors, and the app even crashes during checkout. I tried clearing cache, data, reinstalling—nothing works. My money is stuck and support is not helping, only repeating basic steps. If users can’t use their balance, refund should be provided. Not reliable at all

Never buy anything from blinkit. They have no return and refund policy in this app. I ordered an airpod and got a used airpods and one ear peice was not working. When I tried to return they denied by saying that they gave the right product l which is clearly not true. this app is not reliable at all. They are fraud,not reliable,cheaters and think that the costumers are just dumb

The item delivered is completely different from what I ordered, not just a variation in color or design. I ordered a graph book but received a different product. This is an incorrect delivery, not a representational difference.

Even tho the app is really nice as it provides fast delivery but whenever i order biscuits evertime they were broken and crushed, on the item of 47rs i have to pay 112 rs thats far too extra money in the name of handling charges delivery charges and some no sugar charges its disappointing .

⭐☆☆☆☆ (1/5) Worst experience with Blinkit. The product I received had issues from the beginning and was not up to the expected quality. What made the experience even worse was the customer servicethey were not helpful at all and failed to provide a proper solution. It felt like nobody wanted to take responsibility for the issue. Compared to apps like Zepto, Swiggy Instamart, BigBasket, Flipkart, and Amazon, which usually provide much better customer support and faster resolutions, Blinkit's

very bad experience whenever I order some object it's fine but when I ordered a ice cream it was I think so expired or some older stock . after a day I had civier throught pain one day after I had vomiting and fever around for 2 weeks I was at home and took rest I want to report about this but I find got any option like that in app I din't search so much and just write a review report The I bought was pot mango Ice-cream It also tasted something bad It wasn't sweet at all I also a 12 year

This app is absolutely great, it will take short time to sign up, and most importantly fully locked and loaded up on groceries and household supplies although, it needs to widen it's diversity in gift items otherwise it is already good

Blinkit is an excellent app with the fastest delivery service. The products are of very good quality and are available at attractive discounted prices. The delivery personnel are polite, professional, and well-behaved. The entire purchasing process is smooth, convenient, and hassle-free. I am highly satisfied with the service and would definitely recommend Blinkit to others.

Worst customer support experience with Blinkit. I received a defective birthday gift for my 4-year-old nephew, uploaded the proof video they asked for, and was promised a pickup before refund. No pickup, no call, no update. Even the contact number on Blinkit’s official website doesn’t work. Taking customers’ money is easy, but providing support seems impossible. I strongly suggest people not use or download this app unless they are ready to face zero customer support when problems happen.

Hi, I would like to suggest something. The wishlist feature, right now items are removed from the wishlist once they are ordered. Can it be made so that the items stay in the wishlist when they are ordered? It helps a lot with frequently reordered items.

The delivery partner was extremely rude and showed misconduct. I had ordered a product, and when I went to collect the product, he rudely cancelled the order in front of me. He was saying that he called me, but the fact was I was actively waiting for his call, and didn't get any call.

As a regular Blinkit customer in Chennai, I'm disappointed with the inconsistent service coverage. Areas that were serviceable suddenly become unavailable without explanation. Deliveries are often slower and less reliable compared to Zepto. Product quality and freshness, especially for groceries and vegetables, also seem better on Zepto. Quick commerce depends on consistency and reliability, and Blinkit needs significant improvement in these areas.

to many handling charge in my aread Suppose if I order things of 150 approx blinkit make it almost 200 or 210 by adding the extra money like delivery charge handling charge. This app is for the convenience of people..not for taking too many extra money. Okay, the delivery charge should at least be around 10–20 rupees, or that’s understandable. But charging an extra 40–50 rupees is just not fair.”
